items.caption: A black and white medical x-ray showing a close-up of a hand with a buckle fracture. the fracture is visible as a break in the bone, and the bone fragments are aligned in a way that resembles a buckle. the x-ray is labeled with a red arrow pointing to the buckle fracture, and there is text overlay that reads "buckle fracture" in a stylized font. the background is dark, emphasizing the details of the bone and the fracture.
